response:
SECTION 1  
"what would an innocent person say after he falsely received a verdict from the court?"  
"the truth is often hidden behind a veil of illusion"  
"the weight of guilt can be unbearable"  
"the court may have made a mistake, but the truth remains"  
"the verdict is not the end of the story"  

SECTION 2  
"the innocent person may feel betrayed and confused"  
"the lead of the case may be misleading"  
"the silver lining is that the truth can be uncovered"  
"the sir of the court may have made a mistake"  
"the stranger who witnessed the event may have valuable insights"
